text: Process a batch of 50 scanned receipts (JPEG images) from a folder. For each image, perform OCR to extract the merchant name, date, total amount, and payment method. Validate the extracted data — if any field is missing or ambiguous, flag the receipt for manual review. For valid receipts, categorize expenses into Food, Transport, Office Supplies, and Other. Generate an expense report as a formatted Excel file with a pie chart showing spending distribution, and email the report to finance@mycompany.com.
